programme.title: Dexter Gordon, George Gruntz, Guy Pedersen & Daniel Humair
programme.desc: Dexter Gordon: Live in '63 & '64 features three concerts filmed in Holland, Switzerland, and Belgium that highlight the bebop legend's classic style and silky tone. These shows feature legendary side musicians such as Art Taylor (drums) and Kenny Drew (piano), and jazz classics “Blues Walk”, “A Night In Tunisia”, “Body And Soul”, and others. One of the most influential saxophonists in jazz history, Dexter Gordon is captured in sharp form and style in this 70-minute tour de force.

programme.title: Chucho Valdis
programme.desc: Legendary Cuban pianist Chucho Valdés brought his band ‘Jazz Batá 2' to the Malta Jazz Festival on July 19, 2019. The air was thick with anticipation as Valdés took to the stage, revisiting the small-group concept of his mythical 1972 Cuban album ‘Jazz Batá'. The batá repertoire – the deep classical music of West Africa – permeates Valdés' piano solos throughout the concert. Valdés's band consists of Dreiser Durruthy (Batas and vocals), Yaroldy Abreu (percussions and vocals), Abraham Mansfarroll (percussion), Ramón Vazquez Martirena-Bajo (bass guitar). They delivered a performance that reverberated through the historic island.

programme.title: John Coltrane, McCoy Tyner, Elvin Jones & Jimmy Garrison
programme.desc: The mere mention of the name John Coltrane evokes a deeply emotional, often spiritual response from even the most casual jazz fan. Dexter Gordon was a fantastic saxophonist. Miles Davis was a genius. Coltrane stood above - he was a visionary, a saint-like figure. By the standards of most jazz musicians, his life was uneventful. Sure, he had a heroin habit for a while, and Miles Davis punched him, but once he'd experienced the “spiritual awakening” described in the liner notes of his 1965 album A Love Supreme, he dedicated himself to his music with extreme single-mindedness. This broadcast of Coltrane's 1965 performance at the short-lived Belgian jazz festival in Comblain-la-Tour features Trane's classic quartet with Elvin Jones (drums), Jimmy Garrison (bass) and McCoy Tyner (piano).

programme.title: Christian Scott
programme.sub-title: Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah, West Of The West
programme.desc: In 2019, the vibrant city of Sofia, Bulgaria, hosted the International A to JazZ Festival. Among the featured acts was the trailblazing jazz trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah. This genre-defying artist captivated the audience with his eclectic “stretch music” an approach that incorporates hip-hop and reaches back through the American canon into African percussion and its rich melodic content. Trumpeter Christian Scott aTunde Adjuah's quintet, which includes drummer Corey Fonville, percussionist Weedie Braimah, pianist Lawrence Fields, and bass guitarist Max Mucha, delivered a performance that defied boundaries and expectations.

programme.title: Carla Bley, Steve Swallow, Wayne Krantz & Victor Lewis
programme.sub-title: Carla Bley Sextet live at Estival Lugano 1986
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. Discover the special bond between pianist Carla Bley and bassist Steve Swallow. The two have performed in the same bands since the '60s and have been romantic partners for more than two decades. Watching them perform is the definition of musical telepathy. Together with musicians Wayne Krantz, Victor Lewis, Larry Willis, and Don Alias, they form an amazing sextet at Estival in 1986.

programme.title: Wycliffe Gordon
programme.sub-title: Wynton Marsalis: In This House, on This Morning
programme.desc: The final concert of the Münchner Klaviersommer 1992 was by Wynton Marsalis and his septet. The 31-years-young star trumpeter performed one of his own jazz suites to the sold-out Philharmonie, under the title of ‘In This House, On This Morning'. The concert covers every jazz style, in composition and improvisation, and in both small and grand forms. Marsalis's Septet was made up of Wess Anderson (alto saxophone), Wycliffe Gordon (trombone), Reginald Veal (bass), Herlin Riley (drums), Todd Williams (tenor saxophone), and Eric Reed (piano).

programme.title: Earl Hines
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Alabama Shakes
programme.desc: Mixing classic R&B vocals with a soulful blues-rock base, Alabama Shakes have taken garage rock and turned it on its head. Alabama Shakes takes the Austin City Limits stage for the second time in support of their newest album Sound & Color.

programme.title: Kendrick Lamar
programme.desc: Kendrick Lamar's story is told chronologically through his major hit singles. We chart his career from the earliest performances to the time he was signed to a major label and his breakthrough single was released all the way through to today. New interviews with emerging pop acts, music journalists and record producers to add insight into the life of Kendrick Lamar.

programme.title: Jay-Z
programme.desc: Experience the stories of the stars through their major hit singles. We chart their career from the earliest performances to the present, via breakthrough singles, concerts and signings with major labels. Featuring: Jay Z

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: John Legend
programme.desc: An artist with intellectual skills is John Legend, who studied English with a major in African American literature at the University of Pennsylvania. In college, he participated in a jazz group called Counterparts and at the time was introduced to singer Lauryn Hill, playing piano on the track 'Everything Is Everything' from the singer's first solo album. He finished college in 1999 and began composing his own songs Recorded two independent albums that were sold in their performances: 'John Stephens' (2000) and 'Live at Jimmy Uptown' (2001). He has performed on albums of singers like Alicia Key, Jay-Z and also made the album Wake Up! (2010) along with the American rap group, The Roots. His official discography includes Get Lifted (2004), Once Again (2006), Evolver (2008) and Love in the Future (2013). This presentation in London, 2014, at the Itunes Festival, manages to clean the career of this singer who besides being multitalented can be a human rights activist.

programme.title: Carrie Underwood
programme.desc: Watch Carrie Underwood performing live at the Apple Music Festival. What a unique concert experience, not only for the fans at the Roundhouse, but also for fans across the globe!

programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.desc: Explore the hottest contemporary jazz artists in a smooth-flowing soundscape, featuring melodic and stylish guitars, saxophones, pianos, trumpets.

programme.title: Stingray Smooth Jazz

programme.title: Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & Emma Smith
programme.desc: One night only! Welcome to the spectacular and decadent world of The Babylon Hotel, where music pours out of every crevice like bubbling champagne. In this concert, the upper class meets the underworld in a melting pot of euphoria and extravagance, nostalgia and pleasure with a carefree sinfulness only seen in the exuberant nightlife of the 1920s around the world. The concert features iconic music from movies and series, such as The Great Gatsby, Burlesque, and Babylon Berlin. The music is performed by the Danish National Symphony Orchestra and DR Big Band under the direction of Miho Hazama. The concert also features the Moka Efti Orchestra, and singers Madame le Pustra, Emma Smith, Mademoiselle Karen, Jakob Munch, and Nikko Weidemann, as well as dancers of Sweet Burlesque. This performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in May 2023.

programme.title: Thomas Zehetmair, Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.desc: Iván Fischer conducts the Budapest Festival Orchestra in a concert recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary in 2015. The concert opens with Sergei Prokofiev's Overture on Hebrew Themes, Op. 34. After this, Thomas Zehetmair stars as solo violinist in Prokofiev Violin Concerto No. 2, Op. 63. The second part of the concert is features music by Igor Stravinsky. On the program is music composed for the ballet 'Jeu de cartes' (1937) and the Firebird Suite, No. 2 (1919). 'Jeu de cartes' is one of Stravinsky's neo-classical works and consists of three parts ('deals'). The Firebird Suite, No. 2 is based on the music from the ballet of the same name, which was written for Sergei Diaghilev's Ballets Russes and premiered in Paris in 1910.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Works by Bach, Bartók, and Brahms
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra in an exciting concert program consisting of works by J. S. Bach, Béla Bartók, and Johannes Brahms. The program opens with Bach's Brandenburg Concerto No. 3 in G major, BWV 1048. This is followed by one of Bartók's best-known pieces: Music for strings, percussion and celesta. Remarkable is the work's instrumentation: Bartók divided the strings into two groups that are placed on opposite sides of the stage, to create antiphonal effects. The program ends with Brahms's Symphony No. 3 in F major, Op. 90. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on December 4, 2017.

programme.title: Raphael Pichon, Ensemble Pygmalion, Sabine Devieilhe & Arnaud de Pasquale
programme.sub-title: Mozart - A Gala for the Weber Sisters
programme.desc: On March 23, 1783, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart gave a successful concert at Vienna's Burgtheater that he dedicated to two sopranos: Aloysia and Josepha Weber, the sisters of his wife Constanze. The concert's program would be considered odd by today's standards. The composer's Symphony No. 35 was broken up and interspersed with other compositions, such as concertos, arias, and works for solo piano. Nearly two and a half centuries later, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe, conductor Raphaël Pichon and his Ensemble Pygmalion bring a wonderful concert inspired by that remarkable event. The program includes: ‘Allegro con spirito' of Symphony No. 35, also known as the Haffner Symphony ‘Vorrei spiegarvi, oh Dio', KV 418 ‘Schon lacht der holde Frühling', KV 580 Trio of ‘Die Schlittenfahrt' No. 3, KV 605 Deutscher Tanz No. 6, KV 571 ‘Der Hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' from Mozart's opera Die Zauberflöte ‘Finale: Presto' of Symphony No. 35 ‘Nehmt meinen Dank', KV 383 and ‘Dans un bois solitaire et sombre', KV 308. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Impérial de Compiègne, in Compiègne, France.

programme.title: Señora Acero: Quintanilla abandona el cártel
programme.desc: Traición con traición se paga y Quintanilla entiende que la vida le pasó factura. Sara llega a su límite con la Tuti, quien puede no ser la única embarazada de la casa.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Marcela teme perder su matrimonio: están distantes y como si estuviesen de luto, pero tiene una oportunidad de acercarse a su esposo. No advierten que alguien más los ve.

programme.title: Buscando a Frida
programme.desc: Celebran el cumpleaños de Carolina y una llamada de Cabrera los hace salir corriendo. Aparece el cuerpo de una joven con las características de Frida y sus padres deben ir a reconocerla.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio teme por la seguridad de Victoria, y le sugiere que traslade a Ernesto a otro lugar. Mientras tanto, doña Alba le aconseja a Ximena que aproveche el caos y se vaya con Luzma y Santiago.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Danilo toma a Mónica como rehén, y ella le confiesa que está embarazada para ganar tiempo. En cuanto él se distrae, ella lo mata. Con rabia, Aurelio amenaza al Chema por teléfono.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: El Chema hace que Rutila grabe un video como prueba de vida para Aurelio, ya que quiere hacer negocios. Andrew obtiene material donde el general Garnica aparece con drogas, con el que pretende chantajearlo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Declarada culpable y demente, Gabriela es internada en un centro psiquiátrico. Ella tiene alucinaciones, producto de una droga que le inyectaron. Antonia consigue la custodia de David.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Gabriela es salvajemente golpeada en su celda y pierde al bebé. A Alejandro le hacen creer que ella misma, en su locura, se provocó el aborto. Antonia la visita triunfante y ella jura vengarse.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Willy recupera la vista. Juan Marcos descubre que Laura Aguilar es la encargada de evitar que lo maten. Samantha quiere saber qué pasó con su bebé. Miguel se descuida y Fabiola desaparece.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Ángela está celosa de la oficial Aguilar. Secuestran a Fabiola y Miguel está desesperado. Bernardo le pide matrimonio a Clara. Willy y Samantha piensan en adoptar una niña.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Para evitar represalias con sus hijas, Chivis le hace una confesión a su esposo y una bofetada acaba con la conversación. Antonio y Esteban acorralan a Vicente en la mansión, Majo está aterrada.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: Luego de mantener relaciones sexuales con Vicente, Majo tiene una sospecha que la aterra. Manuel y su hijo corretean a Esteban, quien renuncia a ser chofer y espía. Stella llora por Poncho.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana
programme.desc: El día de la boda de Poncho, Stella besa a Manuel y descubre que ya no lo ama. Antonio ve a Majo cuando besa a Vicente y lo echa de la mansión, pero su hija se interpone en su camino.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: La cárcel podría ser el próximo destino de Bianca, pues Guillermo logra que ella sea denunciada por la esposa del hombre al que atropelló en el accidente. Eliana hace una alianza peligrosa.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Guillermo llega al departamento de Eliana a cobrarle el favor que le hizo, la seduce. Bruno invita a una amiga a su casa a pasar la noche, Bianca los sorprende semidesnudos y enfurece.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Una demanda de 20 millones de dólares le espera a los Piamonte, ya saben que Guillermo está detrás. Flavia ilusiona a Nina nuevamente y le hace creer que Bruno está enamorado de ella.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Flavia tiene un nuevo plan, le cuenta a Ariel lo que está pasando entre Nina y Bruno. Guillermo le deja dinero a Eliana para sus gastos, Bruno lo ve salir del edificio donde vive su exnovia.

programme.desc: Soledad se alegra al pensar que Ana Lucía va a olvidar a Santiago ahora que él está con su verdadera esposa.

programme.title: Amar a muerte: Seducción peligrosa

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Lazos de familia
programme.desc: Elisa enfrenta a Victoria y le asegura que peleará por su hermana. José Luis y Eugenio se unen para acabar con Leonardo.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Entre la vida y la muerte
programme.desc: Paloma se enfurece con Gael al ver que no le importa su bebé. Elisa se debate entre la vida y la muerte.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó: Regreso inesperado
programme.desc: Montserrat le pide a José Luis que la ayude a saber si Alejandro está vivo. Dimitrio le pide a Mónica que viva con él. Alejandro regresa a Agua Azul para poder recuperar a su familia.

programme.title: Teresa: Dinero y amor
programme.desc: Refugio le reclama a Armando por no pagar sus deudas y perder su casa. Mariano decide dar el dinero que ahorro para su boda con Teresa para pagar las deudas de Armando.

programme.title: Rubí: Encarcelada
programme.desc: Alejandro decide demandar a Rubí por la muerte de su esposa e hijo y quiere que pague por el crimen que cometió, más tarde Rubí es detenida. Arturo y Elisa hablan con Maribel para decirle que se van a casar.

programme.title: Amor real: La trampa perfecta
programme.desc: Matilde le dice a Manuel que aceptó casarse con Adolfo por que fue el único que se lo propuso. Adolfo, Delfino y Antonia se encuentran ella le comenta que no es cierto que no es hijo de don Joaquín Fuentes Guerra.

programme.title: Corazón indomable: Arrepentida
programme.desc: Octavio está triste y enojado pues Maricruz no ha ido al hospital a buscarlo, ni ha llevado a su hija Lucía está muy preocupada por la operación de su hijo.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro: Fin de la relación
programme.desc: Fina consigue los papeles que prueban el origen de Renata. Matías le pide a Roberta el divorcio. Agustín se entera de información sobre Roberta, después de pasar la noche con Selene.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Boda fallida
programme.desc: Constancio confronta a Regina por haber adoptado a Mili. Alejandro y Mili se disponen a casarse, pero Luciana, para impedirlo, le revela a Mili que es hija de Constancio. Mientras Regina cae enferma, Mili deja plantado a Alejandro en el altar.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Todo o nada
programme.desc: Pedro salva a Rosario de ser golpeada por los secuaces de Fernando. Juan y Sofía son coronados como los reyes de la fiesta del pueblo. Fernando reta a Juan en un juego de poker para quitarle el dinero que ganó.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Confesión del corazón
programme.desc: Rodrigo le confiesa a Gaviota todo lo que hizo su familia para separarlos y le recuerda la promesa que le hizo. Daniela cree que el amor de Francisco hacia Sofía es mentira.

programme.title: Teresa: Amor rechazado
programme.desc: Arturo le dice a Teresa que acepta divorciarse de ella, aunque la sigue amando. Mariano le dice a Teresa que no quiere tener una relación con ella.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando trata de confrontar a Fernando por la bofetada que le dio. Luis Fernando pretende seguir burlándose de María y hace que le quiten todos sus animalitos, pero don Fernando no lo permite y le compra más.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Luis Fernando le confiesa a María que está enamorado de ella. Luis Fernando lleva a María a la ópera junto con Vladimir y Soraya, pero las cosas se salen de control, ya que Soraya comienza a ofender a María, lo que las lleva a los golpes.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina no puede aceptar que su hijo se preocupe tanto por María Mercedes. El padre de María Mercedes muere lo que la pone muy triste, pero Jorge Luis la consuela.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: El papá de María Mercedes es enterrado, ella está muy deprimida y alguien en su casa quiere atormentarla dejándole una cruz de tierra en su cama.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: San Genis no puede esperar más y le pide a Bella que cumpla con su parte del trato y se case con él. Marimar le confiesa a Sergio que es la nueva dueña de la hacienda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia recibe una carta de Marimar, lo que la hace pensar que regresó por Sergio. Marimar le asegura a Angélica que hará lo que sea para enviarla a prisión por los crímenes que cometió.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María se molesta al enterarse de que Luis Fernando se casará con Soraya. Vladimir le confiesa a su hermana que está enamorado de María.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: Después de ver a Luis Fernando con Soraya, María decide irse de la casa y regresar a su barrio. María se arrepiente de enamorarse de Luis Fernando, pues sufre por su amor no correspondido.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Lirio esta en labor de parto, Leopardo trata de salvar a ella y a su bebé. Cecilia tiene un mal presentimiento, piensa que Marichuy está en peligro. Ivette es sorprendida por Onelia en la habitación de Viviana.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Ivette y Viviana tienen un enfrentamiento que termina en tragedia. Juan Miguel desenmascara a Ivette.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel le informa a Onelia que Viviana esta muerta y ella lo acusa. Lala trata de convencer a Lirio para que se entere de quiénes son sus padres.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Juan Miguel pide apoyo a Patricio por lo del crimen de Viviana y él se declarara culpable. Estefanía le confiesa a Onelia quién es el asesino de Viviana.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: María le deja claro a Bernarda que si la repudia, no podrá volver a ver al pequeño Juan Pablo. Se celebra el desfile y el ganador es Luciano Ferreti. Bernarda aprovecha el tumulto del desfile para secuestrar al pequeño Juan Pablo.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Bernarda le pide a Mamá Lulú que cuide al pequeño Juan Pablo y le miente diciendo que su madre no lo quiere. Guillermo descubre la mentira de Leonela, que no es el padre de Max. Max y María se enteran de que les han robado a su hijo.

programme.title: Triunfo del amor
programme.desc: Max se entera de que Victoria tiene cáncer. Ximena irrumpe en casa de María y, enloquecida, le dice que su hijo ha muerto. Bernarda no está dispuesta a devolver a su hijo a María. Victoria le pide a Max que no le cuente a nadie lo de su cáncer.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Escapar
programme.desc: Paola le confiesa a Piedad cómo fue que aceptó ser la usurpadora. Luciano recibe el dinero pactado con Carlos Daniel por haberle dicho la verdad sobre Paola, y ella planea huir de la mansión.

programme.title: La Gata: Bebé en peligro

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Satisfacción
programme.desc: Rogelio sospecha que Vanesa es la responsable de que sus negocios estén quebrando. Rogelio le promete a Ana Paula una magnífica boda. Bruno se alegra al saber que Rogelio pronto podría quedar en bancarrota.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Hijo legítimo
programme.desc: Los resultados del ADN resultan ser positivos y Bruno puede impugnar el testamento. Maura le dice a Alex que Mario Aguirre no existe y Bruno lo utilizó para su beneficio. Alex y María José pasan su última noche juntos.

programme.title: La desalmada: Noticia inesperada
programme.desc: Octavio golpea a Rafael y le exige alejarse de Fernanda. Rafael le confiesa a Isabela que se casará con Fernanda.

programme.desc: Elisa le cuenta a Lolita que planea casarse con Gael. Elisa teme que Paloma deje de ser su amiga al saber sobre su boda.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte: Welcome to ELEI

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Natasha se encuentra con una presuntuosa y molesta excompañera de la escuela. Vítor y Albertano deciden hacer pasar a Natasha por una exitosa millonaria que vive rodeada de lujos y servidumbre para poner a la presumida en su lugar.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden que lo suyo es ser jefes, y por ello compran una fábrica para producir accesorios para automóvil.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: La familia prepara una despedida de soltera para Martina antes de la boda. Los hombres se ven obligados a asar al futuro marido, que llega con su sexy hija.

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Martina está muy emocionada en el día de su boda: quiere que todo sea perfecto y la Nena la ayudará. El final será totalmente inesperado.

programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco quiere confesarle a Mia que anda con Alma, pero ella no quiere que Roberta se entere. Franco le ofrece trabajo a Miguel. Alma, celosa de Reverte, le dice a Roberta que si quiere se vaya con él. Javier golpea a Diego y lo deja inconsciente.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: León le muestra a Diego su oficina, para que empiece a trabajar con él una amiga de Sabrina llama a Miguel para advertirle que no tuvo relaciones sexuales con ella Franco le dice a Alma que no se precipite al ceder la patria potestad de Roberta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia se entera de que Miguel la engaña y planea su venganza. Alma va a renunciar a la patria potestad de Roberta con tal de que ella sea feliz. Franco habla con Alma y le pide que le dé tiempo a Roberta para que tome la decisión correcta.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma está desesperada por la desaparición de Roberta en el colegio nadie sabe nada. José y Lupita le mienten a Alma al decirle que no saben a dónde fue Roberta. Javier ayuda a Roberta a escaparse, pero al final se arrepiente.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Pese a sentirse mal, Fina se niega a llevar a Roberta con un médico o al hospital. Chema habla con Selene sobre sus sospechas de las fotos que mandaron a Honorio. Una tormenta azota los lugares aledaños a "La Bonita".

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Dinorah huye de su casa después de matar a Fausto para que no la culpen por su muerte. Julia encuentra a Fausto muerto en su oficina y cree que se suicidó. Remedios se siente culpable porque cree que Fausto murió por lo que ella le contó.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Pablo va a buscar a Julia para pedirle que estén juntos, pero ella lo rechaza porque cree que nunca podrán ser felices. Vicente le cuenta a Prudencia que Leopoldo está en la cárcel.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Mientras el comandante Cantú sospecha que Fina podría ser la mujer que le ha hecho tanto daño a Regina, Antonio y Gonzalo intentan que deje la ciudad y se oculte en la hacienda de Jerónimo.

programme.desc: El más extraño de los fanáticos del balompié, se ve envuelto en muchos enredos a causa de su honestidad.

programme.title: Santo y Blue Demon vs. Los Monstruos
programme.desc: Santo y Blue Demon luchan contra un científico que resucita cadáveres trasplantando cerebros vivos en ellos.

programme.desc: La primera experiencia sexual de un grupo de jóvenes amigos de la clase media que viven aventuras, decepciones y ansiedades por pasar de la adolescencia a la adultez.

programme.title: Diabólico asesino
programme.desc: Una mujer lucha contra la drogadicción con la ayuda de su esposo escritor y de su nueva obra dramática.

programme.title: Cuando los hijos se van
programme.desc: Raimundo sufre el repudio de su familia por fechorías que no cometió. La única que cree en él es su madre, doña Lupita, una mujer que sufre profundamente a causa de las decisiones equivocadas de sus hijos.

programme.title: Macario
programme.desc: Macario, un aldeano sumamente pobre, desea comerse él solo un pavo, el cual comparte con la Muerte, quien, como agradecimiento, le entrega un agua curativa con la que hará milagros.

programme.desc: Una joven y su padre sufren un asalto y al intentar proteger a su hija él le dispara al ladrón. Los hijos del ladrón deciden vengarse del asesino de su padre, pero el hermano menor no está de acuerdo a lo que se dedica su familia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Juventud sin salud, más amarga que la senectud
programme.desc: Una joven siente que su mamá no la quiere y solo se preocupa por la salud de su hermana gemela. Cuando un chico se fija en su hermana, la joven comienza a molestarla provocando que sufra un ataque, como consecuencia, la joven cambiará totalmente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Yerros de amor, dignos son de perdón

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Más vale pedir perdón que pedir permiso
programme.desc: Desde niño, Pepe ha pensado que su mamá había muerto. Conoce a una mujer mayor, de la cual piensa que se ha enamorado, sin saber que el destino le tiene preparado una fuerte noticia que cambiará su vida.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: El flojo y el mezquino andan dos veces el camino
programme.desc: Una joven trata de hacer trampa en la escuela y le pide a una de sus compañeras hacer una importante tarea, pero sus planes no salen como esperaba y aprenderá la importancia de hacerse responsable de sus acciones.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa introduces several of her favorite ducks including a solid black Cayuga and a "spotted duck" also known as the Ancona breed, as well as her Buff Goose, discusses the various breeds of waterfowl, and compares the various sizes and colors of duck and goose eggs. Then she makes savory souffles with some of her duck eggs. (S2 E04)

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Maine is known for its wild blueberries. After a trip to a local blueberry farm at the height of the harvest, Lisa is excited to bake blueberry cobbler with homemade whipped cream, and she also makes blueberry ice pops for her flock to help them stay cool. (S2 E05)

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa prepares a holiday meal for friends, but instead of turkey, she decides to highlight some traditional New England Thanksgiving recipes including spiced cranberry sauce, popovers, seafood chowder, and a sweet Indian pudding. And of course she shares some of the scraps and leftovers with her chickens so they can enjoy their own holiday feast. (S2 E06)

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Before Lisa heads south to visit the annual holiday light display at the Coastal Maine Botanical Gardens, she shares a favorite childhood sweet treat. Then after enjoying the festivities, she ends the evening with a traditional creme brulee made with her fresh eggs. She also explains why light is so important in a chicken coop and how to handle the lack of light during the long Maine winters. (S2 E07)

programme.title: Welcome to My Farm
programme.desc: Lisa goes ice fishing under the tutelage of a friend who is a lifelong Mainer. After whipping up omelets for breakfast, they head out onto the lake. Lisa learns how to drill a hole in the ice, then bait and set the traps. After a hardy lunch of beet hash and an unexpected visit from Tyne's three corgis, Lisa and Tyne admit defeat and head back to the house to warm up in front of the fire pit. (S2 E08)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia hosts a dinner party at her home in Austin, Texas, focusing on ingredients that are as locally sourced and homemade as possible. Pulling produce from her own garden, she turns it into pickled vegetables, tomato bread salad, a lemon balm cocktail and more! Georgia even decorates the dinner table entirely with items she has found in nature. (S1 E06)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia is in Charleston, South Carolina where she is preparing a dinner at historic Fenwick Hall. She invites a legendary queen of Southern cooking to come by and teach her the secret to her two ingredient biscuits, learns a Nigerian inspired cocktail from a local sommelier, and heads out on the water to harvest oysters. Georgia also shares her tips for setting a southern outdoor table. (S1 E07)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels back to the South of France, where she once cooked at a Michelin restaurant, and spends time in the olive harvest with a family who is carrying on the tradition of making olive oil. We learn about the herbs that are grown by a farmer late in the season to be infused in the olive oil, and how the oil is used by the baker who is baking bread using heirloom wheat. (S2 E01)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to the Rosebud Native American Reservation in South Dakota and spends time with the Lakota people who are pursuing the “7-generation framework” – their vision for the next 150 years. She learns about the work they are doing to reclaim their food sovereignty, their culture and language, to bring their people back to that sacred place of equilibrium that is essential in building a strong and sovereign tribal nation - where they are physically, spiritually, and mentally whole. (S2 E02)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits the Catskills in New York, where a couple has created a stunning homestead and serves their community through weekly dinners that now attract people from afar. She heads out into the woods, into the root cellar, and into the kitchen with Jake and Elizabeth as they create a beautiful meal for dinner guests. The couple shares how they created this space and offer inspiring ideas for living and entertaining. (S2 E03)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia visits two women who are reclaiming the land that their ancestors once worked, while serving their community through food, farming and ranching. Georgia learns about the ways they are trying to impact and teach others to connect with the land and access healthy food. They roll up their sleeves together in the soil and in the kitchen, making recipes passed down through generations. (S2 E04)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia brings the audience into the kitchen with her to share delicious garden to table recipes. Along the way she pays a visit to an artisan beeswax candle maker who teaches her the art of candle making. Georgia then goes to sit at the pottery wheel with a gifted ceramicist to create candle holders and elements for a table setting. (S2 E05)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: In preparation for a dinner party, Georgia searches for wild edibles in unlikely places, and pays a visit to a pair of women glass blowers who create works of usable art in their glass studio in Brooklyn, New York. They work together to make glass pieces for the dinner table. Georgia brings us back to the kitchen to cook delicious dishes and set a table with their glassware. (S2 E06)

programme.title: Tazed and Amazed
programme.desc: Matt and Froy need to call in the cops to help out with an inebriated old-timer armed with a tazer. Then, on a journey for a Journey, Lou and Froy battle with a bowler. And finally, Froy and Lyndah deal with a back peddling super-sized owner of a Nissan Altima.

programme.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia are on a hunt for a 2007 Porsche & a 2008 Audi from the same drug dealing debtor. Next, Matt and Froy pry a truck from a group of intoxicated idiots at a marina. And finally, Matt and Lou hit up an upscale Glendale neighborhood to scoop up a BMW from a shoe throwing rich couple.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: First, Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers, and a happy married couple, meanwhile Matt and Lou will hook and book. Then, Matt and Froy wrangle with an out-of-work actor who's lost track of the line between his identity and his latest role. Finally, Froy and Lyndah need to figure out how to get a car from an angry owner, and the competing repo company that got to the job first.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones
programme.desc: First, Froy, Lou, and Matt wrestle a group of body builders when going after a Jeep Commander. Next, an unemployed stock broker gets a rude awakening when Lou and Lyndah wake him up inside his car. And finally, Froy learns why you should never text and not drive to pick up Sonia, because she breaks his phone in two.

programme.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?
programme.desc: Matt and Lou find themselves in an upscale neighborhood, facing off with a distraught accountant and his belligerent, kick-happy son. Then, Sonia and Froy crash a pool party where the guests were happy to give up their clothes, but they're not willing to give up their car. Finally, Matt and Lou encounter a hearse that they've been tracking for weeks, but before they're able to hook it up, they've got to figure out what's in the back

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy track down an RV that has been missing for 30 years, only to find that its owner is using it to cart around a group of impetuous young Canadian rock stars.

programme.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers who will stop at nothing to protect their massive tractor-trailer. Next, a young girl learns that she's been a victim of a pyramid scam when Lyndah and Lou come for her car. Finally, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah enjoy a little nightlife when they hit the club to take down an entitled princess who's high on charm, but late on her payments. But the debtor's not the only one who fights to get the car.

programme.title: Jet Skis and Massages
programme.desc: First, the team heads to the beach to grab a little sun as well as two luxury jet skis. Then, Lou and Froy get in touch with their sensitive side when they confront a massage therapist who's as skilled with her hands as she is with her feet. And finally, Lou and Sonia are unknowingly hired to pull a prank on a debtor, which could cost everyone.

programme.title: Get That Prowler
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client? Then, Matt and Froy attempt to repo a DeLorean from a debtor whose car isn't all that's stuck in the 80's. Finally, Lou and Sonia square off against an overgrown child who isn't giving up his Plymouth Prowler without a tussle.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring lending agent, who sets up a sting to repo a limousine from its delinquent owner.

programme.title: Kegger and Refrigerator
programme.desc: First, Lyndah has some tension with Frankie when they repo a truck from a moving company in the middle of relocating some fragile material for a very important client. Then, Froy, Sonia, and Frankie crash a raging kegger in a bad part of town and have to contend with a gaggle of irate partiers in order to secure their target vehicle. Finally, Lou and Matt find themselves in one of the worst situations imaginable when they realize that the car they're trying to repo has been fitted with what seems to be an explosive device.

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune
programme.desc: A watercolour sketch thought to be by the British 20th-century sculptor Henry Moore was one of many artworks to have been looted by the Nazis from German museums in what they branded as degenerate art. Fiona Bruce and Philip Mould have been asked by the Museum of Fine Art in Bern, Switzerland, the owner of the piece, to investigate its provenance. They hope that their investigations will prove to the Henry Moore Foundation that the work is genuine.

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune

They need to uncover proof which, they hope, will persuade the Committee to reassess their previous decision.

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune

programme.title: Yellowstone
programme.desc: Oscar and Emmy winner Kevin Costner is the marquee attraction of the ensemble cast in this drama series, starring as the patriarch of a powerful, complicated family of ranchers. A sixth-generation homesteader and devoted father, John Dutton controls the largest contiguous ranch in the United States. He operates in a corrupt world where politicians are compromised by influential oil and lumber corporations and land grabs make developers billions. Amid shifting alliances, unsolved murders, open wounds, and hard-earned respect, Dutton's property is in constant conflict with those it borders -- an expanding town, an Indian reservation, and America's first national park.

programme.title: Giant Sea Serpent: Meet the Myth
programme.desc: Its extraordinary dimensions, as long as 10 meters, and shape in the form of silver ribbon, inspired the myth of the sea serpent. For the past two years, scientific buoys, immersed at a depth of two thousand meters in the Mediterranean off the French Riviera, have attracted countless species of pelagic fish, among them the Giant Oarfish also known as the "King of Herrings," drifting vertically, alone or by pairs. With the help of the world expert in Giant Oarfish and logistic collaboration of enthusiasts a scientific expedition reveals the biology of this enigmatic ambassador of the abyss.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hot and Cold Crystals
programme.desc: Miners in Chihauhau, Mexico, has just discovered an amazing sight. Deep in the earth, only 300 feet from a pocket of molten magma, is an amazing chamber filled with giant blue and pink crystals – some as big as 60 feet long! It is an extraordinary find – and one that is very difficult to witness, as temperatures run to 150 F, with 100% humidity. The Mexican authorities are only opening up the cavern to scientists and film crews – “Angry Planet” plans to be one of the first in!

programme.title: Angry Planet | Thunder Down Under

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hawaii
programme.desc: We have filmed extensively in Hawaii, filming big-wave surfing at the famous Banzai Pipeline on Oahu's North Shore, and filming George surfing with the “Hawaian Fire” firefighters. We have also filmed at the Hawaii Tsunami Institute and in Hilo, site of major Tsunami damage in both 1946 and 1964. We also have filmed extensively at Kilawea Volcano, filming the amazing sight of rivers and waterfalls of red hot lava flowing into the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: There is No I in Team
programme.desc: After just meeting each other for the first time, the designers are placed in two teams of eight and told that they will be designing in teams for the entire season. For the first challenge, the designers must create unique and individual looks inspired by NYC. They are judged on how well they do as a team…and the team is only as strong as it's weakest link.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The two teams are tasked with designing new uniforms for the popular nightclub/ping pong club Spin. The winning design will be worn by Spin employees. Susan Sarandon appears as a guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are tasked with the Unconventional Materials Challenge. programme.title: Underwater Wonders
programme.desc: Sit back, relax, and embark on a colorful sea undersea voyage filled with the awe-inspiring wildlife wonders of the coral reefs from around the world. Paired with brand new music by Relax Moods, this 4K version is 1 hour long, making it perfect to leave on as a soothing backdrop during your day or while falling asleep.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise 2
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hour long pure nature relaxation experience, "A Day In Paradise" immerses viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's most pure and picturesque tropical islands - for an entire day from sunrise, to sunset. Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: A Day in Santorini
programme.desc: Turn any screen into a window the the Greek Islands with this immensely relaxing HD visual journey through the unique and beautiful coastal village of Oia, found on the far tip of Santorini Island. Slowly awaken your senses as the morning sun rises over the sea, and watch as day slowly passes into dusk. Distant waves break and birds chirp adding an a nice ambient music that combines to create a video that's so relaxing it's almost trance-inducing.

programme.title: Awe Of Nature
programme.desc: Golden sand, crystal-clear waters, infinite blue sky, and a charming hut await on the Dominican Republic's Playa Coson.
